name: database
description: Browse PostgreSQL schemas, tables, and columns. Run read-only SELECT queries with row/time limits.

configSchema.label: Bootstrap Database
configSchema.description: The database to connect to for listing all other databases. Usually 'postgres'. The UI will let you switch databases at runtime.

configSchema.label: Username
configSchema.description: Use a role that only has SELECT on the objects you want to browse.

configSchema.label: Password
configSchema.description: Leave blank to read from the env var NTC_DB_PASSWORD_<PLUGIN_NAME>.

configSchema.label: Max Rows
configSchema.description: Hard cap on rows returned per query. Results past this cap are marked truncated.
